questions.question: Implement a three-node point-to-point network with duplex links between them. Describe the devices used and their configurations in a table format. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use the OSI model to explain your design

questions.question: In a three-node point-to-point network with duplex links, calculate the maximum data transfer rate for each link. Assume the links are 100 Mbps duplex and the nodes are connected in a linear configuration. (8 marks)
questions.hint: Use the formula for duplex data transfer rate

questions.question: What is the advantage of using duplex links in a point-to-point network? Explain with the help of a diagram. (12 marks)
questions.hint: Use a diagram to illustrate the concept
